title: Here’s how the U.S. blockade of Iranian shipping is taking shape.
summary_full: The military’s blockade of Iranian ports aims to suppress sea traffic to and from Iran, while leaving the strait itself open.
summary_public: The military’s blockade of Iranian ports aims to suppress sea traffic to and from Iran, while leaving the strait itself open.
